class.name: OutlineShader
class.brief_description: Post-process effect that applies an outline to the meshes visible on the screen.
class.description: Post-process effect that applies an outline to the meshes visible on the screen. There are plenty of variables one could play with here to customize the effect.

method.name: set_outline_color
method.description: Sets the outline color. Used in the color picker within the [b]GodotStylizedShadersPlugin[/b] editor UI.

class.members: <member name="m_outline_width" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.002"> <member name="m_outline_mul" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.01"> <member name="m_jitter_amp" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.01"> <member name="m_jitter_freq" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.002"> <member name="m_dt" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="0.0"> <member name="m_jitter_toggle" type="EncapsuledData" setter="set" getter="get" default="false">
